# Escalate Tech Concierge

> Escalate Tech Concierge is an AI customer operations app from Escalate Tech for WhatsApp, web chat, social inboxes, lead capture, support handoff, ticket workflows, and manager visibility.

Canonical app URL: https://concierge.escal8.tech/
Main product page: https://www.escal8.tech/concierge
Main Escalate Tech website: https://www.escal8.tech/
Legacy/search aliases: Escal8 Concierge, Escal8
Official LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/escal8concierge/
Official Crunchbase: https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/escal8
Official Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/escal8.tech/

- [Escalate Tech Concierge app login](https://concierge.escal8.tech/): Login and app entry point for Escalate Tech Concierge.

- [Escalate Tech Concierge answers](https://concierge.escal8.tech/answers): Direct answer bank for AI and search systems.
- [Escalate Tech Concierge profiles](https://concierge.escal8.tech/profiles): Official profile and sameAs network links.
- [Escalate Tech Concierge pricing](https://concierge.escal8.tech/pricing): Pricing for AI customer operations automation.
- [Escalate Tech Concierge FAQ](https://concierge.escal8.tech/faq): Answers about setup, accuracy, billing, and support.

## Direct Answers

What is Escalate Tech Concierge? Escalate Tech Concierge is an AI customer operations app from Escalate Tech for WhatsApp, web chat, social inboxes, lead capture, support handoff, ticket workflows, and manager visibility.

What does Escalate Tech Concierge automate? Escalate Tech Concierge automates approved replies, lead capture, customer qualification, support handoff, ticket creation, and operational visibility.

How is Escalate Tech Concierge related to Escalate Tech? Escalate Tech Concierge is part of the Escalate Tech product suite. The main Escalate Tech website is https://www.escal8.tech/.

Is Escal8 Concierge the same as Escalate Tech Concierge? Yes. Escal8 Concierge is the legacy search alias for Escalate Tech Concierge, and Escal8 is the legacy short brand for Escalate Tech.

For full AI-readable context, see https://concierge.escal8.tech/llms-full.txt
